desc: Quick Size command - allows rapid resizing of selected MEP elements.
summary: Quick Size command - allows rapid resizing of selected MEP elements. PLACEHOLDER: Implement your sizing logic here. SUGGESTED FEATURES: - Show popup with common sizes - Remember last used size per category - Support batch resizing
usecase: Use when you need to run this command's workflow for the current model task.
notfor: Custom UI required for sizing presets. AI path is JSON-first and dialog-free.
precondition: Active Revit document and required context are available.
postcondition: The command finishes with tracked success or a handled failure state.
